title: United
description: A family-friendly technical Minecraft experience with optimized performance and fun features for players of all ages.
body:
# 📝 Overview

This modpack combines technical gameplay features with family-friendly elements, optimized performance, and database integration. It's designed for shared family servers where both technical players and younger users can enjoy Minecraft together.

Further information:
- [Keyboard Shortcuts](https://cheatography.com/bullshit/cheat-sheets/mc/)
- [Mods](https://mc.united.ovh/mods.html)
- [Server Mods](https://mc.united.ovh/server_mods.html)
